Mo To Compel Responses To Interrogs To Judgt Debtor Timothy Mayer, & Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-06-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Responses To Interrogatories To Judgment Debtor Timothy Mayer and For Sanctions is ordered off calendar as the motion was not timely filed and served. The motion was filed on September 19, 2005, less than 16 court days prior to the hearing date. [See C.C.P. Section 1005(b).] COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Order To Show Cause Re Sale Of Real Property Containing A Dwelling
Off Calendar Sep-12-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Court Call Appearance: Montie Day, Esq., 208-280-3766 for plaintiff Picker International, Inc.
Timothy Mayer, 415-297-5160, defendant appearing in propria persona.

RULING:
A R G U E D and The Court GRANTED THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE SALE OF REAL PROPERTY CONTAINING A DWELLING. THE COURT PERMITTED A STAY TO ALLOW THE DEFENDANT TO PAY $6,809.30 PLUS INTEREST.
